title: Nursing retention toolkit: Improving the working lives of nurses in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Nursing retention toolkit: Improving the working lives of nurses in Canada
Download in PDF format (2.82 MB, 75 pages)
Organization: Health Canada
Published: 2024-03-01
Cat.: H22-4/38-2024E-PDF
ISBN: 978-0-660-70405-0
- Flexible and balanced ways of working
- Organizational mental health and wellness supports
- Professional development and mentorship
- Reduced administrative burden
- Strong management and communication
- Clinical governance and infrastructure
- Safe staffing practices
- Appendix: Sources to reference resources and examples
